summary: Iteration 187: Tested new AI Intelligence Services (Gap 5-7). All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend shows all 7 gap cards on /ai-learning page.
critical_code_review_comments: Gap 5 (Duplicate Intelligence): Service correctly tracks false-positive duplicate flags per vendor and auto-clears unreliable vendor duplicates
Gap 6 (Amount Anomaly): Integration in document_readiness_service.py correctly detects unusual amounts and routes high-severity anomalies to review
Gap 7 (Escalation Intelligence): Service correctly pre-routes vendor+doc_type combos with consistent failures to manual review
All new endpoints properly integrated: /api/posting-patterns/gap-closer/status returns all 7 gaps, /api/posting-patterns/duplicate-intelligence, /api/posting-patterns/escalation-intelligence
Frontend LearningDashboard.js correctly renders all 7 gap cards with proper data-testid attributes
context_for_next_testing_agent: New intelligence services (Gap 5-7) are fully functional. Gap Closer section on /ai-learning now shows 7 gaps instead of 4. The duplicate-intelligence and escalation-intelligence APIs return valid summaries. Batch-clear endpoint works for auto-clearing safe duplicates.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/posting-patterns/gap-closer/status - PASS (returns all 7 gaps including gap_5_duplicate_intelligence, gap_6_amount_anomaly, gap_7_escalation_intelligence)
